name: Review runner.ts
instruction: Review the file packages/server/src/core/runner.ts. Focus on error handling and edge cases.

name: Review scaffold.ts
instruction: Review packages/server/src/core/scaffold.ts. Are there any issues with the shell command execution or file operations?

name: Security check
instruction: Check packages/server/src/routes/harness.ts for any security concerns around file operations or input validation.
